refactorings_applied: DRY: Extract MAX_TIMER_MESSAGE_LENGTH to timer-constants.ts (eliminated duplication in timers/route.ts local constant and TimerPane.tsx magic number 10000)
DRY: Extract TIMER_COLUMNS constant in timer-db.ts (SQL column list was repeated in 3 SELECT queries)
KISS: Optimize stopTimersForWorktree to use in-memory timerWorktrees Map instead of redundant DB query via getTimersByWorktree
Remove unused getTimersByWorktree import from timer-manager.ts and corresponding test mock
commits: 6f9e77c4: refactor(timer): improve code quality and eliminate duplication

no_refactoring_needed: SOLID: All modules already follow single responsibility (timer-constants for config, timer-db for persistence, timer-manager for scheduling, route.ts for HTTP, TimerPane for UI, NotesAndLogsPane for tab integration)

Pattern consistency: timer-db follows same patterns as memo-db.ts (mapRow, DB.Database param, snake_case rows); timer-manager follows schedule-manager.ts globalThis pattern; timer-constants follows auto-yes-config.ts pattern with type guards
Error handling: Already consistent (try-catch-finally in executeTimer, fixed-string errors in route.ts [SEC-MF-001], silent catch in UI polling)

message: Refactoring complete. Applied 4 improvements (2 DRY, 1 KISS, 1 cleanup). All 5329 tests pass. No static analysis errors. Code quality maintained at high level.
